findings.description: The source specifies '実行時例外/エラー' (RuntimeException or Java Error), but the knowledge file generalizes this to '例外'. The distinction matters: this handler catches unchecked exceptions and Java Errors only, not checked exceptions. Losing this precision could mislead an AI into stating the handler intercepts all throwables.
findings.source_evidence: 後続ハンドラの処理中に実行時例外/エラーが発生した場合、エラー内容をもとに応答電文を作成し
